Ntc Of Motion To Withdraw From Arbitration And Request For Trial
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: andrew h. lange, esq., law offices of lange & lange, 415.981.7386 specially appearing for neil eisenberg, counsel for plaintiff mark jacques; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROGER HEFFNER's Motion To Withdraw From Arbitration And Request For Trial is Denied. Defendant fails to establish any basis for an exemption from the arbitration requirement under CRC 3.811(b). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
